title: Verify user can pause the trial and content access is restricted
description: Tests the functionality of pausing the trial and verifies the corresponding UI and content access changes.
preconditions: User is in an active trial and belongs to the target cohort.

steps.description: 3. On the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click 'Pause Anyway & Lose Access'.

expected_result: The trial status is updated to 'Paused'. The homepage widget updates to the 'paused design'. In the Trial Corner, all content sections are locked.
